recommendations.title: The Muppets Take Manhattan
recommendations.overview: When the Muppets graduate from Danhurst College, they take their song-filled senior revue to New York City, only to learn that it isn't easy to find a producer who's willing to back a show starring a frog and a pig. Of course, Kermit the Frog and Mis

recommendations.title: One Froggy Evening
recommendations.overview: A workman finds a singing frog in the cornerstone of an old building being demolished. But when he tries to cash in on his discovery, he finds the frog will sing only for him, and just croak for the talent agent and the audience in the theater he's s

recommendations.title: Muppets Most Wanted
recommendations.overview: While on a grand world tour, The Muppets find themselves wrapped into an European jewel-heist caper headed by a Kermit the Frog look-alike and his dastardly sidekick.

recommendations.title: The Princess and the Frog
recommendations.overview: A waitress, desperate to fulfill her dreams as a restaurant owner, is set on a journey to turn a frog prince back into a human being, but she has to face the same problem after she kisses him.

recommendations.title: The Muppets
recommendations.overview: When Kermit the Frog and the Muppets learn that their beloved theater is slated for demolition, a sympathetic human, Gary, and his puppet brother, Walter, swoop in to help the gang put on a show and raise the $10 million they need to save the day.

recommendations.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Family, Comedy, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear's love of food trucks and viral videos get out of hand, the brothers are now chased away from their home and embark on a trip to Canada, where they can live in peace.

recommendations.title: Pirates
recommendations.overview: The adventures of pirate Captain Red and his first mate Frog.

recommendations.title: The Restaurant
recommendations.overview: A great French restaurant's owner, Monsieur Septime, is thrust into intrigue and crime, when one of his famous guests disappears.

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: Paddington
recommendations.overview: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.
